title: codereview-pass2: 02a-coordinated-capacity.md RFC2119 overuse and arbitrary constants
description: Multiple MUST statements lack sufficient justification or cross-references to test vectors/rationale (e.g. '3x beacon interval', '10 intervals', 'mod 65536'). Arbitrary numbers should be parameterized or justified in appendix-design-rationale.md. Also, file should include full header with table of contents placeholder for future sections on desync FSM per the chunk task. P2 spec precision issue.
notes: Starting small chunk updates per task. Parallel subagents for review. Will create children for codereview passes if needed. First chunk: header+TOC.
close_reason: 3 complete codereview passes filed (P0-P2 resolved, only P3/P4 opinion/style findings); RFC2119 overuse fixed with boilerplate+selective use, arbitrary constants parameterized or justified in new Appendix A per IETF style. Edits in 3 chunks with mandatory reviews after each.
